content: [CORE] Build TAE state machine orchestrator (src/runtime/TAE.ts) with 8 states + state transitions
[AUDIO] Create reactive ambient audio engine (src/runtime/AudioReactor.ts) with state-driven synthesis
[VIDEO] Implement MP4 environmental render sampler (src/runtime/VideoSampler.ts) + color extraction
[RENDER] Build liquid orb UI emission system (src/components/OrbRuntime.tsx) with organic growth
[API] Build 5 TAE API endpoints (routes.py) + runtime state management
[PWA] Configure manifest.json + service worker for immersive fullscreen
[INTEGRATION] Wire TAE into App.tsx + HomeView for complete activation
[VERIFY] Build + test demo mode activation + all state transitions + audio reactivity
